official_functions.role: Construct the official Configuration serverbound resource_pack response packet with the official UUID/action record shape
Write the official Configuration serverbound resource_pack response body
Write the full Configuration serverbound framed resource_pack response packet
Dispatch and decode the full Configuration serverbound framed resource_pack response packet
Name the packet id assigned in Configuration serverbound state
Read the decoded response UUID, action, and official action terminal flag from the official packet instance

invariants: The official Configuration serverbound protocol codec writes the packet table id before the resource_pack response body.
The official Configuration serverbound protocol codec dispatches the framed packet id to ServerboundResourcePackPacket.
The decoded official ServerboundResourcePackPacket preserves the UUID and Action passed to the official constructor.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded UUID, decoded action, action terminal flag, and remaining decode byte count are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove runtime resource pack UI, accept/reject behavior, Configuration completion, or Play readiness.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer initialized runtime resource pack behavior or Configuration-to-Play readiness.
